name: kube_dns
explanation: kube-dns exposes Prometheus metrics on the fixed path `/metrics` over its dnsmasq metrics port (10055 by default). The shipped auto_conf templates `http://%%host%%:10055/metrics`, which is the upstream default. No credentials are required — the metrics port is unauthenticated by design. The integration is functionally identical in shape to coredns/etcd: one URL with one canonical port, OpenMetrics on the wire.
notes: kube-dns is the legacy cluster DNS (replaced by CoreDNS in k8s 1.13+). For new deployments coredns is the relevant integration; kube_dns auto-config still applies to clusters that haven't migrated.
